summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of FinPulse Phase 3 - all sections, navigation, CRUD operations, and modals tested successfully. All data is MOCKED (no backend).

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0'. This occurs briefly during initial render but charts display correctly.

passed_tests: Login page loads correctly with Google button
Mock login redirects to /dashboard
Dashboard Overview - Summary cards (Saldo Total, Receitas, Despesas, Investimentos) display correctly
Dashboard Overview - Due items cards (Vencidos, Vencendo, Futuro) display correctly
Dashboard Overview - Receitas vs Despesas chart with period filters (7d, 1m, 3m, 6m, 1y, 5y, 10y, 25y) works
Dashboard Overview - Despesas por Categoria pie chart displays correctly
Dashboard Overview - Metas Financeiras section with aporte button works
Dashboard Overview - Transações Recentes section displays correctly
Sidebar navigation - All 12 menu items navigate correctly
Receitas Section - List displays with filters, Nova Receita modal opens with form fields
Receitas Section - Create new receita works (form submission)
Receitas Section - Edit button opens modal, delete button removes transaction
Despesas Section - List displays with filters, Nova Despesa modal opens
Despesas Section - Detail items expansion works when detalhado is enabled
Categorias Section - Grid of categories displays with edit/delete buttons
Categorias Section - Nova Categoria modal opens with color picker
Orçamento Section - Total budget bar and individual category budgets display with progress bars
Orçamento Section - Novo Orçamento modal opens with category selector
Investimentos Section - Total invested, chart with period filters, investments by bank display
Investimentos Section - Novo Investimento modal opens, Aporte and Histórico buttons work
Investimentos Section - Financiamento modal opens
Simulador Section - Capital, aporte, taxa, inflação inputs work, projection chart displays
Simulador Section - Prazo buttons (1, 5, 10, 25 anos) work
Contas e Cartões - Cartões tab shows card visuals with Pagar Fatura button
Contas e Cartões - Parcelas expansion shows installments with individual Pagar buttons
Contas e Cartões - Contas Bancárias tab shows accounts with linked cards/investments
Contas e Cartões - Nova Conta modal opens with form fields
Heatmap de Gastos - Calendar displays with color-coded daily expenses
Heatmap de Gastos - Month/year navigation works
Relatórios Section - Period selectors and quick filters work
Relatórios Section - Report cards display with Baixar PDF buttons
Metas Financeiras - Goals display with progress bars and aporte buttons
Metas Financeiras - Nova Meta modal opens
Importar Extratos - Drag-drop area and file selector button display
Configurações - Profile section displays user info
Configurações - Preferências toggles work
Logout - Sair button clears auth and redirects to login
critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED DATA: All data comes from /app/frontend/src/data/mockData.js - no backend integration
Console warning in charts during initial render (dimension -1) - cosmetic issue only, charts render correctly after initial paint
ESLint warning in OtherSections.jsx line 139 about useMemo dependencies - minor code quality issue
test_credentials: Mock login - click 'Entrar com Google' button
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - all data is mocked in mockData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features tested and working. Data is MOCKED (mockData.js). Mock login sets localStorage 'findash_auth' to 'true'. All CRUD operations work locally but don't persist (no backend). Charts have console warnings during initial render but display correctly.
